description_long: This sports car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a two-tone color scheme of vibrant green and off-white. The front end is rounded with prominent, stylized headlights and a low, wide grille, while the sides display bold, sweeping green accents that enhance its dynamic appearance. The roofline is low and tapers smoothly toward the rear, where a pronounced rear spoiler and dual exhausts emphasize its sporty character. The car sits on shiny alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design, and the windows are tinted black, adding to its modern, high-performance look. The doors are subtly integrated into the body, and the overall form is compact yet muscular, suggesting agility and speed. Chrome details and a visible license plate complete the urban-ready aesthetic.
description: A compact, aerodynamic sports car with a green and off-white color scheme, bold curves, and a rear spoiler. Features include stylized headlights, alloy wheels, and a sleek, modern profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, large stylized headlights, wide grille, and the green hood accent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sweeping green accent, low roofline, alloy wheels, and the rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhausts, rear spoiler, taillights, and the license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the green accent, alloy wheels, and the aerodynamic profile.
